# atlassian_jira_screen_tab (Resource)

Manages a tab on a Jira Cloud screen.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_screen_tab" "example" {
  screen_id = atlassian_jira_screen.example.id
  name      = "Example Tab"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the screen tab.
- `screen_id` (String) The ID of the screen this tab belongs to. Changing this forces recreation of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the screen tab.
